description: Golden set for retrieval quality evaluation. Each entry has a natural-language query and the IDs of documents that SHOULD be retrieved.

queries.query: how does the audit hash chain work
what model should I use for a security-sensitive task
how does wave execution and parallel orchestration work
how do I track token costs and budget enforcement
how does the knowledge store persist and retrieve entries
what happens during council consensus and synthesis
how do instincts get captured and promoted to skills
what verification checks run before marking a task complete
how does the autonomous stuck detector recover failed tasks
how are hooks triggered and what security gates exist pre-commit
